productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Kids Boys Printed Green Tshirts
description: CompositionParrot green round neck T-shirt, has navy blue ribbing around the round neckline, fabric tape detailing around the inseam of the neckline, short sleeves, and a combination of  appliqué, print and embroidery on the chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryLet your little sailor man fiddle with the randomness of life and reach a step closer to his dreams with this T-shirt, decorated with random appliqué and print.
